sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mualtung le zang lei pan, Hong kipuak hih thuman,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni, Khris tung
muan huai ni;
Tua aw hong ging hiauhiau, mual tung teng thawn viauviau,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai
ni, Khris tung muan huai den ni.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Gualzo ding hita! Gualzo ding hita!
“Kuan
un” ci’n Topa kiko,
Hong sawlna mang lehang,
Gamluah ding hita hang,
Muan huai ve
ni, muan huai ni,
Khris tung muan huai den ni.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Leitung bup lingsak aw, za un,
galhangte aw,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni, Khris tung muan huai ni;
Nasem ding kuan khia un,
hong gen thu tangko un,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni, Khris tung muan huai den
ni.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: No zong ko hong pawm un, mawhna pan hong tai un,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni,
Khris tung muan huai ni;
Satan dialkhiana ah, sa ni, gualzawhna la,
Muan huai ve ni, muan huai ni,
Khris tung muan huai den ni.
